---
title: "Action dual tasks reveal differential effects of visual imagery perspectives on motor performance"
authors: "Callow, N., Edwards, M., Jones, A. L., Hardy, L., & Connell, S."
year: 2019
date: 2019-01-01
pub-journal: "Quarterly Journal of Experimental Psychology"
volume: "72(6)"
pages: "1401–1411"
doi: "10.1177/1747021818811464"
pdf: "assets/papers/2019/Callow_etal_2019.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
